evidence: standards/enterprise/supply-chain-legal.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: An unavailable integrity mechanism requires the exact artifact and origin, custody controls, risk owner, approved organization-policy decision, expiry, and supported verification plan; mismatch is never waived by successful compilation.
statement: Fetched, mirrored, or vendored artifacts MUST use every integrity mechanism supported by their distribution contract, and any checksum or signature mismatch MUST block trust pending authorized resolution.
